flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Claremont McKenna College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.1k → $68.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Claremont McKenna College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.1k → $68.0k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Claremont McKenna College are 61% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($104.7k vs $64.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Claremont McKenna College rose 10% between 2007 and 2010 (1.1k → 1.3k).
